markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Mark Vientos records 3+ hits in the New York M vs Cincinnati professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 17, 2026 at 12:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Mark Vientos is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Mark Vientos starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Mark Vientos is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Mark Vientos is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Mark Vientos: 3+ hits?
